# Canvas Editor — Task List

---

## 1. HEADER / ROLES

- [ ] Comment role: show only `View | Comment` tabs in header (hide Edit)
- [ ] Viewer role: show only `View | Presentation` tabs in header (hide Edit and Comment)
- [ ] Viewer role: ensure existing comments are visible (read-only)
- [ ] Presentation mode: accessible for all roles (viewer, commenter, editor)
- [ ] Add `GALLERY` button on the right side of the header (all roles)

---

## 2. COMMENTS SYSTEM

### Bubble UI
- [ ] Remove bottom-center ADD COMMENT button
- [ ] On hover any canvas element: show animated `+` bubble at the side of the element
  - Commenter role: bubble is clickable to add new comment
  - Viewer role: bubble appears only if element already has a comment (shows user photo avatar)
- [ ] Bubbles must always be anchored to their element — move with it when element is repositioned on canvas

### Permissions & Resolve Flow
- [ ] Any user with comment role can mark a comment as RESOLVED
- [ ] Resolved comments remain visible but grayed out
- [ ] Only the project owner (edit role) can permanently delete a comment thread
- [ ] When edit role is active: show `Delete Comment` button inside thread

### Storage
- [ ] Store all comments in Supabase (including soft-deleted/resolved ones)
- [ ] Define/confirm comments table schema via MCP

### Reply System
- [ ] Add `Reply` button inside comment thread
- [ ] Allow user to reply to a specific message within a thread OR to the whole thread
- [ ] Render reply hierarchy clearly in thread UI

---

## 3. VIEWER ROLE — EXPORT & FORK

- [ ] Viewer can see all comments (read-only, no add/resolve)
- [ ] Add `Export / Download` button (right side) — available to all roles
- [ ] Add `Fork` button (right side) — copies project to viewer's own account as owner
- [ ] Fork available to all roles (viewer, commenter, editor)

---

## 4. EDIT — ELEMENT INSERTION (Mouse Cursor Mode)

- [ ] Clicking any add button in right panel (Image, Text, Card, Button, etc.) changes cursor to include element icon
- [ ] Element is NOT placed automatically at canvas center
- [ ] Click-release on canvas: place element at default size
- [ ] Click-drag on canvas: place element with dynamic size
  - **Image**: preserves aspect ratio on drag
  - **Text**: creates bounding box; text fits inside dynamically
  - **Button**: scales box and font size on drag
  - Same behavior extended to all other element types

---

## 5. EDIT — INLINE TEXT EDITING

- [ ] Double-clicking a text element edits it inline (no modal/window)
- [ ] Component size recalculates in real-time as text is typed
- [ ] Remove selection box artifact from text elements when not selected
- [ ] Add explicit "permanent border" toggle option (separate from selection state)

### Translation-Aware Editing
- [ ] On hover any text element: detect if current language ≠ original language
  - If different language: show two edit options — `✎ ORIGINAL` | `✎ TRANSLATION`
  - If same as original: show only `✎ ORIGINAL`
- [ ] Double-clicking text directly always edits original language data
- [ ] Options must not overlap other UI elements on hover

### Right Panel — Translations Tab
- [ ] When a text element is selected: add a `Translations` tab in right panel
- [ ] Tab shows all original text fields alongside their translations for each language (e.g. `en`, `pt`)
- [ ] Edits auto-save to Supabase
- [ ] Respect and connect with existing glossary logic

---

## 6. EDIT — TEXT TOOLBAR (Hover)

- [ ] On hover any text (canvas element or card sub-element): show small floating toolbar above text with:
  - `B` Bold
  - `I` Italic
  - `🔗` Link
  - `S̶` Strikethrough
  - `Aa` Font Select
  - All icons have on-hover tooltip labels
- [ ] Toolbar must not overlap with translation edit options
- [ ] Position logic: auto-adjust so both toolbars (format + translation) never collide

### Right Panel — Text Options
- [ ] Expand right panel text section with full typography controls:
  - Font family selector with live preview on hover
  - `Import Font` option (upload from computer, stored in Supabase)
  - Font size, weight, color, line height, letter spacing
  - Default font presets

---

## 7. EDIT — CARD COMPONENT

### Structure
- [ ] Each card has an editable title at top
- [ ] Below title: infinite dynamic cells (grow as needed)
- [ ] Each cell can hold: text, image, button, link, or other elements
- [ ] Empty cells show dotted-border skeleton with centered `+` icon
- [ ] Visual separators between cells

### Resizing
- [ ] Card itself is resizable via edge handles
- [ ] Each cell element is individually resizable (edge arrows)
  - Image: resize with proportion lock
  - Text: font size scales proportionally
  - Button: box and font scale together

### Drag & Drop (Critical)
- [ ] Card is draggable on canvas
- [ ] Card sub-elements (text, image, button) are draggable within the card to reorder (adaptive grid)
- [ ] Card sub-element can be dragged OUT of card onto the canvas as a standalone element
- [ ] Canvas standalone elements can be dragged INTO a card cell
- [ ] All above drag interactions must be production-ready and fully functional

### Right Panel — Card Edit
- [ ] Clicking a card opens expanded right panel with tabs/sections:
  - Layout options
  - Per-sub-element configs (font, size, color, image crop, button style, etc.)
  - All configs connected live to canvas rendering
- [ ] All card data (structure, styles, content, sub-elements) stored in Supabase (confirm schema via MCP)

---

## 8. SUPABASE / DATA LAYER

- [ ] Use MCP to inspect existing tables before writing any new schema
- [ ] Comments table: id, project_id, element_id, user_id, body, resolved, deleted, created_at
- [ ] Card data table: card configs, sub-elements, positions, styles
- [ ] Fonts table: custom imported fonts (user_id, file_url, font_name)
- [ ] Translations table: element_id, language_code, field_key, value — confirm against existing structure
- [ ] All auto-save operations debounced and non-blocking
